product.name: AutoStream
product.tagline: Automated video editing for modern content creators
product.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides AI-powered automated video editing tools designed specifically for content creators — from YouTube channels and Instagram reels to TikTok shorts and podcast clips.

refund.policy: No refunds after 7 days from the date of purchase
refund.trial: Refund requests made within 7 days of purchase will be processed in full

support.basic_plan: Email support only, with a typical response time of 24 hours
support.pro_plan: 24/7 live support available via chat and phone

policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your plan remains active until the end of the current billing period with no additional charges.
